creator: sirfredrick@vivaldi.net
text:
After installing all the shared libraries required to run the Chromium browser in the Linux "emulator", trying to run ./chromium-browser causes it to output `Segmentation fault (core dumped)`
Even though Chromium browser is available as a port under www, this would open up the doors to run other Chromium based browsers through the Linux "emulator".

Chromium 73.0.3683.86 x64
FreeBSD 12.1 Release

Chromium downloaded from here:
http://mirror.math.princeton.edu/pub/fedora-archive/fedora/linux/releases/30/Everything/x86_64/os/Packages/c/chromium-73.0.3683.86-2.fc30.x86_64.rpm
